symptom_observed: Unusual noise from ID fan bearing housing — metallic sound at high speed
initial_assessment: Possible bearing race damage — recommend vibration analysis

symptom_observed: Dark smoke from stack during normal operation — fuel consumption increased 10%
initial_assessment: Incomplete combustion — burner nozzle may need cleaning or replacement

symptom_observed: Water dripping from bottom of economizer casing — small but continuous
initial_assessment: Possible tube pitting or pinhole leak — needs UT thickness check during next outage

symptom_observed: White deposits on mist eliminator blades visible through inspection port
initial_assessment: Calcium sulphate scaling — wash cycle may be insufficient or nozzles blocked

symptom_observed: Chilled water temperature 2°C above setpoint despite full load operation
initial_assessment: Possible vacuum loss or crystallization in absorber section
follow_up_needed: Yes — vacuum test and solution sample

symptom_observed: Refractory cracks visible on furnace sidewall above bed — 3 locations
initial_assessment: Thermal fatigue cracking — non-urgent but needs repair at next planned shutdown
follow_up_needed: Yes — plan repair in annual outage

symptom_observed: Foaming observed in evaporator feed tank — affecting level control
initial_assessment: Possible organic contamination in feed water or antifoam dosing exhausted

symptom_observed: Coal feeder belt slipping during wet coal feeding — erratic bed temperature
initial_assessment: Belt tension needs adjustment — also check coal moisture specification
